

Baldwin, B.G., Thornhill, A.H., Freyman, W.A., Ackerly, D.D., Kling,
M.M., Morueta‐Holme, N. & Mishler, B.D. (2017) [Species richness and
endemism in the native flora of
california](https://doi.org/10.3732/ajb.1600326). *American Journal of
Botany*, **104**, 487--501.

Bui, E.N., Thornhill, A.H., González‐Orozco, C.E., Knerr, N. & Miller,
J.T. (2017) [Climate and geochemistry as drivers of eucalypt
diversification in australia](https://doi.org/10.1111/gbi.12235).
*Geobiology*, **15**, 427--440.

Carta, A., Pierini, B., Roma-Marzio, F., Bedini, G. & Peruzzi, L. (2017)
[Phylogenetic measures of biodiversity uncover pteridophyte centres of
diversity and hotspots in
tuscany](https://doi.org/10.1080/11263504.2017.1353550). *Plant
Biosystems - An International Journal Dealing with all Aspects of Plant
Biology*, **152**, 831--839.

Cassis, G. & Laffan, S.W. (2017) *[Biodiversity and bioregionalisation
perspectives on the historical biogeography of
australia](https://doi.org/10.1201/9781315373096)*. *Handbook of
australasian biogeography* (ed. by M. Ebach), pp. 1--16. Taylor;
Francis.

Guedes, T.B., Sawaya, R.J., Zizka, A., Laffan, S., Faurby, S., Pyron,
R.A., Bérnils, R.S., Jansen, M., Passos, P., Prudente, A.L.C.,
Cisneros‐Heredia, D.F., Braz, H.B., Nogueira, C. de C. & Antonelli, A.
(2017) [Patterns, biases and prospects in the distribution and diversity
of neotropical snakes](https://doi.org/10.1111/geb.12679). *Global
Ecology and Biogeography*, **27**, 14--21.

Heenan, P.B., Millar, T.R., Smissen, R.D., McGlone, M.S. & Wilton, A.D.
(2017) [Phylogenetic measures of neo- and palaeo-endemism in the
indigenous vascular flora of the new zealand
archipelago](https://doi.org/10.1071/sb17009). *Australian Systematic
Botany*, **30**, 124--133.

Mannix, E.J., Knerr, N. & Encinas‐Viso, F. (2017) [A comparison of
network and clustering methods to detect biogeographical
regions](https://doi.org/10.1111/ecog.02596). *Ecography*, **41**,
1--10.

Millar, T.R., Heenan, P.B., Wilton, A.D., Smissen, R.D. & Breitwieser,
I. (2017) [Spatial distribution of species, genus and phylogenetic
endemism in the vascular flora of new zealand, and implications for
conservation](https://doi.org/10.1071/sb16015). *Australian Systematic
Botany*, **30**, 134--147.

Scherson, R.A., Thornhill, A.H., Urbina-Casanova, R., Freyman, W.A.,
Pliscoff, P.A. & Mishler, B.D. (2017) [Spatial phylogenetics of the
vascular flora of chile](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ympev.2017.04.021).
*Molecular Phylogenetics and Evolution*, **112**, 88--95.

Thornhill, A.H., Baldwin, B.G., Freyman, W.A., Nosratinia, S., Kling,
M.M., Morueta-Holme, N., Madsen, T.P., Ackerly, D.D. & Mishler, B.D.
(2017) [Spatial phylogenetics of the native california
flora](https://doi.org/10.1186/s12915-017-0435-x). *BMC Biology*,
**15**.

Yu, F., Skidmore, A.K., Wang, T., Huang, J., Ma, K. & Groen, T.A. (2017)
[Rhododendron diversity patterns and priority conservation areas in
china](https://doi.org/10.1111/ddi.12607). *Diversity and
Distributions*, **23**, 1143--1156.

Zhang, H., Bonser, S.P., Chen, S., Hitchcock, T. & Moles, A.T. (2017)
[Is the proportion of clonal species higher at higher latitudes in
australia?](https://doi.org/10.1111/aec.12536) *Austral Ecology*,
**43**, 69--75.

Zhang, H.-X. & Zhang, M.-L. (2017) [Spatial patterns of species
diversity and phylogenetic structure of plant communities in the
tianshan mountains, arid central
asia](https://doi.org/10.3389/fpls.2017.02134). *Frontiers in Plant
Science*, **8**.
